signals.headline: SOUTH KOREA CPI HOLDS STEADY AT 2
signals.raw:
SOUTH KOREA CPI HOLDS STEADY AT 2.0% YoY IN FEBRUARY 2026, BUT UPSIDE RISKS RISE WITH OIL & KRW; FORECAST UPGRADED TO 2.2% | NO | MED confidence**

South Korea's headline annual CPI inflation stayed at **2.0% YoY** in February 2026, matching prior levels despite Lunar New Year effects, as government measures curbed fresh food (-2.7%) and petroleum (-2.4%) prices[1]. Core inflation (ex-food/energy)
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
